title: Returning Shoes That Don't Fit
summary: Olivia returns a pair of shoes to a shop assistant, Nathan, because they are too small, and asks to exchange them for a bigger size.

body.speaker: Olivia
body.text: Hi, I'd like to return these shoes. They don't fit me.

body.speaker: Nathan
body.text: No problem. What seems to be the issue with them?

body.speaker: Olivia
body.text: They're a bit too small. My toes feel really tight at the front.

body.speaker: Nathan
body.text: I see. Do you have the receipt with you?

body.speaker: Olivia
body.text: Yes, here it is. I bought them last weekend.

body.speaker: Nathan
body.text: Thank you. Would you like a refund, or an exchange for a different size?

body.speaker: Olivia
body.text: I'd prefer to exchange them. Could I get the next size up?

body.speaker: Nathan
body.text: Of course. What size were these, and what would you like instead?

body.speaker: Olivia
body.text: These are a size seven. Could I try a size eight, please?

body.speaker: Nathan
body.text: Let me check the stockroom. I think we have that size in the same color.

body.speaker: Olivia
body.text: That would be great. I really like the color, so I just need a better fit.

body.speaker: Nathan
body.text: Here you go. Why don't you try them on to make sure they're comfortable?

body.speaker: Olivia
body.text: These feel much better. There's plenty of room for my toes now.

body.speaker: Nathan
body.text: Wonderful. Since the price is the same, there's nothing more to pay.

body.speaker: Olivia
body.text: Perfect. Thank you so much for your help.

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.text: Hi, I'd like to return these shoes.
sentences.translationVi: Chào anh, tôi muốn trả lại đôi giày này.

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.translationVi: Chúng không vừa với tôi.

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.translationVi: Không sao cả.

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.text: What seems to be the issue with them?
sentences.translationVi: Chúng có vấn đề gì vậy ạ?

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.translationVi: Chúng hơi nhỏ một chút.

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.text: My toes feel really tight at the front.
sentences.translationVi: Các ngón chân của tôi cảm thấy rất chật ở phía trước.

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.translationVi: Tôi hiểu rồi.

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.text: Do you have the receipt with you?
sentences.translationVi: Anh/chị có mang theo hóa đơn không?

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.translationVi: Có, đây ạ.

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.translationVi: Tôi đã mua chúng vào cuối tuần trước.

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.translationVi: Cảm ơn anh/chị.

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.text: Would you like a refund, or an exchange for a different size?
sentences.translationVi: Anh/chị muốn hoàn tiền, hay đổi sang cỡ khác?

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.translationVi: Tôi muốn đổi chúng hơn.

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.text: Could I get the next size up?
sentences.translationVi: Tôi có thể lấy cỡ lớn hơn một số không?

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.translationVi: Tất nhiên rồi.

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.text: What size were these, and what would you like instead?
sentences.translationVi: Đôi này cỡ bao nhiêu, và anh/chị muốn đổi sang cỡ nào?

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.translationVi: Đôi này là cỡ bảy.

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.text: Could I try a size eight, please?
sentences.translationVi: Tôi có thể thử cỡ tám được không ạ?

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.translationVi: Để tôi kiểm tra trong kho.

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.text: I think we have that size in the same color.
sentences.translationVi: Tôi nghĩ chúng tôi có cỡ đó với cùng màu.

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.translationVi: Vậy thì tuyệt quá.

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.text: I really like the color, so I just need a better fit.
sentences.translationVi: Tôi rất thích màu này, nên tôi chỉ cần một đôi vừa hơn thôi.

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.translationVi: Đây ạ.

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.text: Why don't you try them on to make sure they're comfortable?
sentences.translationVi: Sao anh/chị không thử chúng để chắc chắn là chúng thoải mái?

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.translationVi: Đôi này cảm giác dễ chịu hơn nhiều.

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.text: There's plenty of room for my toes now.
sentences.translationVi: Giờ thì có nhiều chỗ cho các ngón chân của tôi rồi.

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.translationVi: Tuyệt vời.

sentences.speaker: Nathan
sentences.text: Since the price is the same, there's nothing more to pay.
sentences.translationVi: Vì giá như nhau, nên không phải trả thêm gì cả.

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.translationVi: Hoàn hảo.

sentences.speaker: Olivia
sentences.text: Thank you so much for your help.
sentences.translationVi: Cảm ơn anh rất nhiều vì đã giúp đỡ.

hintStarters.text: Could I get the next size …?
Would you like a refund, or …?

annotations.phrase: I'd like to return these shoes
annotations.meaningVi: Tôi muốn trả lại đôi giày này
annotations.exampleEn: Hi, I'd like to return these shoes.

annotations.phrase: What seems to be the issue
annotations.exampleEn: What seems to be the issue with them?
My toes feel really tight at the front.
Do you have the receipt with you?
Would you like a refund, or an exchange?
Would you like a refund, or an exchange for a different size?
Could I get the next size up?
We have that size in the same color.
I just need a better fit.
Why don't you try them on?
There's plenty of room for my toes now.
Since the price is the same, there's nothing more to pay.

grammarNotes.title: Polite requests with 'Could I …?'
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'Could I + động từ nguyên thể?' để đưa ra yêu cầu lịch sự. Ví dụ: 'Could I get the next size up?' và 'Could I try a size eight, please?'
grammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'Could I + base verb?' to make a polite request. Examples: 'Could I get the next size up?' and 'Could I try a size eight, please?'

grammarNotes.title: Expressing preference with 'I'd prefer to …'
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'I'd prefer to + động từ' để nói bạn thích làm điều gì hơn. Ví dụ: 'I'd prefer to exchange them.'
grammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'I'd prefer to + verb' to say what you would rather do. Example: 'I'd prefer to exchange them.'

criticalThinkingQuestion: What things should you check before buying shoes or clothes so that you don't have to return them later?
